title: cryptantha hispidissima
intro: Cryptantha hispidissima is a species of flowering plant in the borage family, commonly known as hairy cryptantha or desert star, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cryptantha hispidissima include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant may include tinctures, teas, and salves, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves and stems in a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
